title: Crispy Peruvian Tortilla Wrap
description: A twist on traditional wraps, this Peruvian-inspired dish combines crispy tortilla with peppery flavors.

ingredients.name: Wrap Filling
ingredients.notes: Cooked beans, corn, and diced vegetables

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Fry tortilla for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
Transfer tortilla to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Spread peppery sauce evenly over the tortilla, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle shredded cheese over the sauce.
Add wrap filling, followed by a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Drizzle lime juice over the top.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cut into halves or quarters, depending on serving size.
